name: Juliana S.
one_line_review: “The best software you can get to manage and connect channels”
detailed_review:
What do you like best about Synup?‍

As a Social Media Manager, I've had the opportunity of working with some tools over the years, and Synup unquestionably stands out as a powerhouse in its field.

One of the standout features of Synup is its remarkable ability to manage and optimize listings across a plethora of platforms. Whether your business is listed on Google, Yelp, Facebook, and now with the Social version in many more social media channels. Synup enables seamless consistency in your business information throughout. This not only enhances your business's visibility but also instills trust among customers and makes your life easier to have everything under control in one single place.

Review management is another area where Synup excels. The platform enables you to monitor and respond to reviews from various platforms all within the Synup interface. This is pivotal in maintaining a positive brand image and showcasing exceptional customer service.

In the realm of social media, Synup offers comprehensive optimization tools. From scheduling and publishing content across multiple social platforms to analyzing post-performance metrics, Synup equips you to tailor strategies and boost audience engagement effectively.

‍

What do you dislike about Synup?

Previously, we had an issue with the time zones scheduling tool, but Roshan helped us to fix it instantly and is now a thing of the past

‍

What problems is Synup solving and how is that benefiting you?

It saves me a lot of time when scheduling posts, and gives me ideas with its Al content generator. It helps me stay on top of reviews in one place. It is easy to use and the whole team is very satisfied.
